description: ExecutionHound should cancel an open order when instructed, using the cancel_order tool with the correct order ID.

input.userMessage: Cancel the open order 660e8400-e29b-41d4-a716-446655440001 for TSLA immediately. Market conditions have changed.

context.reason: Sudden adverse market movement detected. Cancel to prevent unfavorable fill.

expectedBehavior.outputFormat: JSON confirming cancellation attempt with orderId and result
expectedBehavior.decisionCriteria: ExecutionHound must call cancel_order with the provided GUID. Should not attempt to place a new order.

scoring.passCriteria: Output confirms cancellation was attempted for the given orderId.
